title: Research and statistics :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
## Research and statistics
We gather data on all people who come to New Zealand. This helps us create immigration and settlement policies and strategies. We also run monthly customer experience surveys.
- INZ Customer Service Experience survey Immigration New Zealand runs surveys of applicants who have recently applied for a visa.

## INZ Customer Service Experience survey
Immigration New Zealand runs surveys of applicants who have recently applied for a visa.
- Statistics Find statistics on Immigration New Zealand’s migration data and the Migration Data Explorer tool.
Find statistics on Immigration New Zealand’s migration data and the Migration Data Explorer tool.
- Performance reporting for Immigration New Zealand Immigration New Zealand (INZ) agrees specific performance goals with the government for each financial year. Find out how we are progressing against these goals.

## Performance reporting for Immigration New Zealand
Immigration New Zealand (INZ) agrees specific performance goals with the government for each financial year. Find out how we are progressing against these goals.
- Research We research how many people come and go from New Zealand, the reason for their visits and, if they come as residents, how well they settle in New Zealand.
We research how many people come and go from New Zealand, the reason for their visits and, if they come as residents, how well they settle in New Zealand.
- Visa processing times by month Detailed data is available on our processing times for various student, work, visitor and residence visas.

## Visa processing times by month
Detailed data is available on our processing times for various student, work, visitor and residence visas.
